description_long: This object is a long, crusty baguette-style sandwich, sliced into two pieces, with visible layers of green lettuce and what appears to be slices of deli meat or chicken. The bread has a golden-brown, slightly matte finish with a few flour marks and a soft, airy interior. The filling is mostly leafy greens and pale, round slices of meat, peeking out from the sides of the bread. The sandwich is presented without any visible packaging or plate, and the cut end reveals the cross-section of the ingredients. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, hand-prepared sub sandwich, typical of a deli or casual eatery. The object is clean and appetizing, with no visible branding or additional garnishes.
description: A fresh, long baguette sandwich cut in half, filled with green lettuce and sliced deli meat, with a golden-brown crust and soft interior.
description_view_0: The sandwich is shown lengthwise, clearly displaying both the whole and cut halves, with visible lettuce and meat filling.
description_view_1: An angled view highlights the top crust and the filling peeking out from the sides, emphasizing the sandwich's thickness.
description_view_2: The rear view shows mostly the bread's exterior, with minimal filling visible and the rounded ends of the baguette.
description_view_3: A diagonal rear view focuses on the cut ends and the bread's surface texture, with a glimpse of the sandwich's interior.
